title: Crispy Grilled Chicken Wings Peruvian Style
description: A fusion twist on traditional grilled chicken wings, marinated in a Peruvian-inspired mixture of spices and grilled to perfection. Serve with a side of your favorite dipping sauce.

ingredients.name: aaji amarillo pepper paste
ingredients.notes: or substitute with aji amarillo seasoning

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lime juice, olive oil, aji amarillo pepper paste, garlic powder, cumin, coriander, black pepper, and salt.
Add the chicken wings to the marinade, toss to coat, and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the chicken from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Grill the chicken wings for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through and crispy.
Transfer the wings to a plate and garnish with chopped cilantro.
Optional: for an extra crispy coating, toss the wings in a bowl with a little more olive oil and a sprinkle of aji amarillo seasoning before serving.
